LanguageData.FB_FleshmassBoneWallReinforcement.label: fleshmass bone wall reinforcement
LanguageData.FB_FleshmassBoneWallReinforcement.descri: Unlock reinforced fleshmass walls, letting the colony heart grow rigid bone structure inside ordinary fleshmass walls at a higher hemogel cost.
LanguageData.FB_FleshmassBoneWallReinforcement.genera: subject_story->grew bone lattices inside colony walls
subject_story->reinforced living walls with internal skeletal struts
